name: Phalen Park Golf Course
about: Phalen Park Golf Course features an indoor golf simulator facility within its clubhouse, operating year-round to complement its seasonal outdoor 18-hole course. The venue provides three state-of-the-art simulators available for hourly booking with a full-service bar and grill. While the outdoor course is closed for the 2025 season, the simulators offer a year-round golfing option with leagues and special pricing. The facility is geared towards both casual practice and organized events, with amenities including a 200-seat banquet room that can be rented for private occasions.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to state-of-the-art golf simulators
Full-service bar and grill available during simulator sessions
Happy hour pricing for off-peak weekday sessions
Banquet facilities available for private events and group outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full service bar and grill available during simulator sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but it's standard practice to bring your own clubs for simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service bar and grill, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole simulator sessions typically take 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue offers a 'Youth on Course' program, suggesting it accommodates junior golfers, though specific details about simulator age restrictions are not provided.
